title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Sodexo India Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Sodexo India Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Reservation Manager with drive and ambition, Sodexo India Global Group in Bhubaneswar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sodexo India Global Group:
Sodexo India Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Customer Relations

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sodexo India Global Group!
